name: ddo-prompt-optimizer
description: Diagnostic Dialogue Optimization framework for prompt repair.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/ddoEngine.js && node --check src/openaiAdapter.js && node --check src/dataset.js && node --check src/env.js && node --check src/prompts.js && node --check src/utils.js && node --check src/index.js && node --check bin/ddo.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check scripts/doctor.js && python3 -m compileall -q ddo_optimizer python_tests
scripts.test: node --test test/*.test.js && python3 -m unittest discover -s python_tests
